1 ?05 0000100101 3

Constant
1 C 1 1111111111 a mismatch
1 C 1n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
1 I 0 1000011000 3 mismatch
1 I 0n 0111100111 7 mismatch

Unary 5
1 I 5 1000111101 6 mismatch
1 I 5n 0111000010 4 mismatch

Binary 05
1 AND 05 1000011000 3 mismatch
1 AND 05n 0111100111 7 mismatch
1 OR 05 1000111101 6 mismatch
1 OR 05n 0111000010 4 mismatch
1 XOR 05 0000100101 3 match 1/3
2 XOR 16 1100001100 4 match 2/3
3 XOR 27 1001011100 5 match 3/3
all match XOR 05 16 27
1 XOR 05n 1111011010 7 mismatch
1 AND-NOT 05 0000000000 a mismatch
1 AND-NOT 05n 1111111111 a mismatch

1 0000100101 3

Starting at I 4 increasing
I 5 1000111101 partial 0111100111 7
I 6 1001111111 partial 1010001100 4
I 7 0000101010 partial 0110001001 4
left 15
Starting at I 3 decreasing
I 2 1001110110 partial 1111010101 7

1 I 5
2 I 6
3 I 7

Selected
0 I 4
1 XOR 05
2 XOR 16
3 XOR 27
4 I 3
5 I 4
6 I 5
7 I 6

Applying to 01010000
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 4 = 0
1 XOR 05 = XOR(I 0,I 5) = XOR(0,0) = 0
2 XOR 16 = XOR(I 1,I 6) = XOR(1,0) = 1
3 XOR 27 = XOR(I 2,I 7) = XOR(0,0) = 0
4 I 3 = 1
5 I 4 = 0
6 I 5 = 0
7 I 6 = 0

\boxed{00101000}
